resources:
Cook & Calc Calories Fats Carbs Proteins Weight, g Ingredient Name Dish Name
Home Saved dishes Info Tap to copy Delete Save Add ingredient Next step No ingredients available Edit ingredient Cancel Delete this ingredient? Do you want delete this dish? Edit this dish"> Recommended calories:"> *1 gram of fat - 9 kcal,\n 1 gram of protein - 4 kcal,\n 1 gram of carbohydrates - 4 kcal Character limit exceeded (maximum Estimated calories Use Add Calculate All weight, gram Weight not correct Calculations for your dish No saved dishes Start to adding ingredients for dish Hello chefs! You can add ingredients and calculate your dish It\'s very useful if you cooking home food and trying to calculate calories I hope you will enjoy my app If you have any questions or suggestions, please contact me Send me an email Rate the App Share me, please! Privacy policy Terms & Conditions Do you like Cook&Calc? We\'re doing our best to improve your experience. We\'d really appreciate it if you could rate us! First Star Second Star Third Star Fourth Star Fifth Star Rate us! Try the app Share Cook&Calc>
